name: @ts-runtypes/bin
description: Platform launcher for the ts-runtypes resolver binary. Resolves and execs the prebuilt native binary for the host platform; the binary itself rides as a per-platform optional dependency. Ships zero runtime dependencies.
comment:tsgo: Pinned tsgolint / typescript-go revision the published binaries are built against. Pure metadata (not part of semver); refreshed at publish time by scripts/release/build-binaries.mjs.
comment:optionalDependencies: Intentionally EMPTY in source — the dev tree resolves the locally built bin/ts-runtypes. The full per-platform set (ts-runtypes-binary-<os>-<arch>, pinned exact-equal to this package's version) is injected into the PUBLISHED tarball only, by scripts/release/build-binaries.mjs.
